title: Senior Revenue Manager at The Lalit Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at The Lalit Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, The Lalit Hotels in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Lalit Hotels:
The Lalit Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Lalit Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
